resources.string:
"Press the voice button, hold it, say one the following commands, and release the button:
 1. "Turn on all lights" - Turns on all three LED lights.
 2. "Turn off all lights" - Turns off all three LED lights.
 3. "Turn on light one" - Turns on the first LED light (the same for second and third LEDs in all commands with the number of LEDs)
 4. "Turn off light one" - Turns off the first LED light.
 5. "light one red" - Sets the color of the first LED light to red.
 6. "light one blue" - Sets the color of the first LED light to blue.
 8. " light one green" - Sets the color of the first LED light to green.
 9. " light one yellow" - Sets the color of the first LED light to yellow.
 10. " light one pink" - Sets the color of the first LED light to pink.
 11. " light one white" - Sets the color of the first LED light to white.
"
